_comment: Shared catalog fields for NOAA MDBC UxS acquisition records (PS2418 / EN2501). XML-parsed fields (title, fileId, abstract, sensors, platform ID/desc, DQ) always win — this patch only fills gaps. UUIDs from GCMD KMS — verify before publication.

mission.purpose: Provide high-resolution multibeam bathymetry, backscatter, and sub-bottom profile data at deepwater dome sites to characterize deep coral ecosystem conditions, extent, type, and abundance in support of NOAA MDBC restoration and predictive habitat modeling.
